title: jasione corymbosa var. glabra
intro: Jasione corymbosa var. glabra, also known as a type of hairy or smooth juniper, is a flowering plant in the bellflower family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits of Jasione corymbosa var. glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although its usage should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
